title: Regime-Gated Strategy Router (Momentum vs Mean-Reversion + Position Sizing)
summary: Two-state market regime detector (VIX proxy + SPY 200-day MA + HMM) that dynamically routes between momentum and mean-reversion signal weighting, and scales position size via a VIX-regime scalar. In bull/low-vol regimes: amplify momentum signals. In choppy/high-vol: amplify mean-reversion signals and reduce position size. Connects to the HMM Regime Detection spec.
